title: 有馬記念の後に・笑顔の花火

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is the year's last big race, and
Kitasan Black has crossed the finish line ahead of
the pack.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final factor that led her to victory was the
countless fans cheering for her. Her dream of
bringing smiles to all has come true at last.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black and Satono Diamond promise to
continue running together from here on out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black has become the festival guru and
receives a ground-shaking ovation. She's
surrounded by smiles as she proudly stands as
everyone's most beloved Umamusume.
